form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 7 over 278m at Launceston behind Deadly Power beaten 7 lengths (16.53) in a Grade 5. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 340m at this track behind Lochinvar Hornet beaten 7 lengths (19.86). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Well supported here last start but failed to deliver, finishing finished 4th on April 9 over 340m at this track behind Myall Clyde beaten 2.25 lengths (19.72) in a Other. Placed two back at this track. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 278m at Launceston. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.
